professional_identity.title: Senior WordPress Fullstack Engineer & Technical Project Lead
professional_identity.tagline: 620+ Production Sites · Enterprise Platforms · AI-Augmented Delivery
professional_identity.summary: Senior WordPress Fullstack Engineer with 5.5+ years of end-to-end ownership across 620+ production sites — from server configuration and custom plugin architecture to client requirement analysis and team leadership. Proven in delivering enterprise-grade platforms (eCommerce, membership, subscription, directory, banking, booking) with a focus on performance, security, and scalable architecture. Engineered raw-API payment gateways, ACF/WooCommerce subscription engines, dynamic PDF generation systems, global document management platforms, and standalone PHP applications. Drives 3× delivery speed through expert-level AI-augmented workflows (Cursor Pro, Claude, Gemini, Grok) and mentors teams through complex technical challenges.

employment.role: WordPress Developer — Fullstack + Technical Project Lead
responsibilities_and_achievements: Delivered 50+ international projects end-to-end across US, UK, and New Zealand markets — owning client calls, requirement analysis, Figma/PSD/XD-to-WordPress builds, QA, and on-time launches
Reduced a 3,000-redirect migration to 250 logic rules using advanced Regex — saving ~4 developer-days and eliminating manual SEO risk

Engineered 25+ custom WordPress plugins solving architectural challenges: full membership subscription platform (Elementor + ACF + WooCommerce Subscriptions + RBAC), global document management system with one-click dynamic PDF/ODF generation, and a custom WooCommerce dashboard after migrating 750+ products from OpenCart

Built backend-driven global document management system (Castle Trust UK) where a document updated in one place automatically propagates across the entire site; integrated dynamic PDF generation triggered on every ACF field change
Integrated Workable API for automated live job listing ingestion and expired role removal (Castle Trust UK careers page)
Developed advanced SVG draw animations and GSAP scroll-triggered interactions for EIS Club, alongside a custom investment calculator for on-site engagement

Built a WooCommerce eCommerce site (Boilers n Bits) featuring a highly customized multi-step checkout, tailored customer dashboard, ACF relational field logic for suggested tabbed products, and advanced shop filtering
Delivered a fully customized Webflow platform (Identos Inc.) with Finsweet V2 attribute filtering, HubSpot form integration with custom layout overrides, and advanced Webflow Interactions animations
Architected a 100+ page multilingual site using WPML with custom templates, dynamic routing, and advanced redirection logic
Automated user onboarding by binding ACF profile fields directly to WooCommerce billing/shipping, reducing manual data entry
Integrated Salesforce and Pipedrive via deep API connections, syncing CRM workflows directly with WordPress client portals
Built a Chrome extension for SEO migration automating metadata transfer between sites — JavaScript, GPL-3.0 open source
Led and supervised sub-teams on large data migrations, QA cycles, and tight-deadline recoveries
Accelerated team throughput 3× by introducing AI-augmented workflows (Claude Pro, Cursor Pro, Gemini, Grok, Qwen) with expert-level context engineering
Conducted technical interviews and mentored new team members on global variables, modular architecture, reusable components, and production-grade coding standards

Engineered a raw-API PayGlocal custom payment gateway (no WooCommerce dependency) — implementing tokenization, HMAC signature validation, callback handling, secure server-side logic, and a custom UI; enabling international payments for StudentHelp with zero plugin overhead

Built a subscription-based consulting engine (Aliq.se) integrating WooCommerce Subscriptions with monthly consulting-day credits, consultant availability/booking dashboards, and automated subscription sync
Architected an advanced multi-step Elementor form system (GuideMeEducation) with per-step saving, entry deduplication, dynamic GET/POST appending, and a custom post-to-WooCommerce-cart plugin
Improved Core Web Vitals by 40–60% across multiple client sites via advanced minification, caching strategies, and query optimization
Delivered 300+ WordPress sites spanning eCommerce, directory portals, doctor/hotel booking with payment gateways, membership & subscription platforms, and PSD/Figma/XD-to-WordPress builds

Owned full infrastructure lifecycle: NGINX config, SSH/server hardening, malware recovery, live database restoration, backup automation, staging deployments via Git + DDEV/Docker, and Google PageSpeed optimization

Custom Elementor development: dynamic URL widgets with GET/POST routing, custom post templates, ACF Pro flexible/repeater field integrations, CPT/taxonomy architectures, and JetSmartFilters-powered search systems

ai_tools_and_workflow: Expert-level context engineering for architecture, debugging, and delivery acceleration

key_metrics.context: US, UK, New Zealand — end-to-end ownership
Membership, payment, CRM, PDF, and more

key_metrics.metric: Delivery Speed Boost via AI Workflows

projects.title: PayGlocal Custom Payment Gateway
projects.description: Built an entire payment system from scratch without WooCommerce dependency — tokenization, HMAC-signature validation, encrypted callback handling, secure server-side logic, custom UI, and full error management.
projects.outcome: Enabled fully operational international payment processing with zero plugin dependency or licensing risk.

projects.title: Global Document Management & Dynamic PDF System
projects.description: Backend-driven document management system where a single update propagates site-wide. Scheduled ACF field changes for product management. Dynamic PDF/ODF generation triggered automatically on every ACF field or product data change — no manual workflow required. 'Summary Box' PDF regenerates live.
projects.outcome: Eliminated manual document publishing overhead for a regulated UK banking platform.

projects.title: Subscription-Based Consulting Engine
projects.description: Credit system tied to subscription renewals, consultant availability calendars, booking dashboards, and full subscription history. Automated all subscription sync end-to-end.
projects.outcome: Automated end-to-end consulting operations, eliminating all manual admin overhead.

projects.title: Smart Multi-Step Bulk Apply Form
projects.description: Per-step saving, entry deduplication, dynamic GET/POST appending, and a custom post-to-WooCommerce-cart bridge plugin. Multi-step application form with full state persistence.
projects.outcome: Increased application completion rates; dramatically reduced student onboarding friction.

projects.title: Loan Management System
projects.description: Full-cycle loan management: customer management, loan creation, repayment tracking, statement generation, RBAC admin roles, audit logs, encryption, and CSRF protection.
projects.outcome: ~70% reduction in financial reconciliation time; improved data accuracy and auditability.

projects.title: Banking Document System & OpenCart to WooCommerce Migration
projects.description: Dynamic PDF/ODF document generation system. Large-scale OpenCart migration with 750+ products migrated and a custom WooCommerce dashboard built post-migration.
projects.outcome: Seamless platform transition; custom dashboard adopted as primary operations interface.

projects.title: Enterprise Webflow Platform
projects.description: Fully customized Webflow build with strong UX and polished interactions. CMS-driven dynamic templating, advanced Finsweet V2 attribute filtering, custom HubSpot form integration with full layout overrides, global component & style library for brand consistency.
projects.outcome: Standardized brand consistency across the platform; reduced future build time significantly.

projects.title: WooCommerce eCommerce — Boilers n Bits
projects.description: Highly customized multi-step checkout, tailored customer dashboard experience, ACF relational field logic for suggested tabbed products, and advanced filtering across shop pages to improve product discovery.
projects.outcome: Improved conversion flow and product discoverability across the shop.

projects.title: SVG Draw Animations, GSAP Interactions & Investment Calculator
projects.description: Advanced SVG draw animations and classic scroll-triggered GSAP animations for a highly engaging, interactive browsing experience. Custom investment calculator to support user decision-making and improve on-site engagement.
projects.outcome: Significantly elevated on-site engagement and visual storytelling quality.

projects.title: Portfolio CMS — Popup, Multi-Post Loop, FAQ Search & Gallery Slider
projects.description: Portfolio popup experience supporting images and videos. Multiple post types in a single loop with tag-based filtering. High-performance FAQ search. Elementor repeater field onboarding form with dynamic repeatable input sections. Custom ACF-powered gallery slider for case studies.
projects.outcome: Rich, interactive content experience covering portfolio, news, client support, and case studies in one cohesive CMS.

projects.title: Real Estate CMS with Zoho CRM Integration
projects.description: Clean, user-friendly real estate website with vertical gallery layout, custom property management via custom post types, and contact forms integrated directly with Zoho CRM.
projects.outcome: Seamless lead capture pipeline from website to CRM without manual data entry.

projects.title: Vacancy Accordion Shortcode
projects.description: Styled <details>/<summary> accordion shortcode [vacancy_accordion] querying a 'vacancy' custom post type with ACF fields. Inline CSS embedding, output buffering pattern for functions.php.
projects.outcome: Reusable, dynamic vacancy listing component requiring zero page rebuilds.

projects.title: ACF Repeater Icon Box Shortcode
projects.description: ACF repeater-driven icon box shortcode [icon_box_buttons] built for use inside an Elementor Loop Grid. Iterative refinement of PHP shortcode structure with inline CSS embedding and output buffering.
projects.outcome: Flexible, editor-friendly icon box system fully driven by ACF repeater fields.

open_source_repos.name: acf-gallery-slider
open_source_repos.description: Creates a beautiful, responsive gallery slider with thumbnail navigation (Swiper.js) for ACF gallery fields.

open_source_repos.name: data-copier-chrome-extension
open_source_repos.description: Copy unlimited fields from Source to Target tabs automatically. Once mapped, it remembers the fields for future use. Built for SEO migration automation.

open_source_repos.name: dynamic-url-button-with-get-parameters
open_source_repos.description: A custom Elementor widget for creating buttons with dynamic GET parameters and style customization.

open_source_repos.name: filterable-gallery-elementor-pro
open_source_repos.description: Elementor Filterable Gallery with Dynamic Post Type and Custom Taxonomy support. No third-party filter plugins required.

open_source_repos.name: gsap-process-horizontal-timeline-widget-elementor
open_source_repos.description: Adds a GSAP-powered animated Process Timeline custom widget to Elementor.

open_source_repos.name: subscription-consulting-im
open_source_repos.description: Manage subscription-based consulting services integrated with WooCommerce Subscriptions. Credit system, booking dashboards, availability management.

recent_work_in_progress.detail: Building [vacancy_accordion] shortcode querying 'vacancy' CPT with ACF fields. Iterative refinement of PHP shortcode structure, inline CSS embedding, output buffering patterns for functions.php.
